creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
update to 1.014

Fix: PORTNAME=      Test-Dir
-PORTVERSION=   1.006
+PORTVERSION=   1.014
 CATEGORIES=    misc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=  CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= p5-
@@ -16,6 +16,8 @@

 PERL_CONFIGURE=        yes

-MAN3=          Test::Dir.3 Test::Folder.3

+               Test::Dir::Base.3 \
+               Test::Folder.3

 .include <bsd.port.mk>
